titleStmt.title: SII 23.276: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 276. (A.R. No. 276 of 1907.) Tiruviḍaimarudūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple—on the same base Vikrama-Chōḷa: year 10: 1126-27 A.D.

summary.p: This is evidently connected with No. 274 above. It is incomplete, large portions being peeled off at the end. It records the grant of the taxes on certain lands measuring about 35 vēli in all, by order of the king, for burning two sets of lamps, one set consisting of 160 and the other of 240 lights, in the hall Vikramaśōḻan-tirumāḷigai in the temple. A third set of lights under the name Tiruvaṇukkaṉ-tirunundāviḻakku, to be burnt in the central shrine, is also mentioned as having been endowed for in the 9th year, by the queen Tribhuvanamuḻuduḍaiyāḷ. The king is said to have been occupying the royal seat Śōḻakōṉ in the hall known as Tyāgasamudraṉ-tiruveḍuttukkaṭṭil in the temple, at the time of making the grant.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmātu puṇara puvimātu vaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu nilavat taṉṉirupatamalar maṉṉavar cūṭa maṉṉiya Urimaiyāl maṇi muṭi cūṭic ceṅkol ceṉṟu ticaitoṟum vaḷarppa veṅkali niṅka meyyaṟan taḻaippak kaliṅka miriyak kaṭalmalai naṭātti valaṅkoḷāḻi varaiyāḻi naṭappa Iru cuṭaraḷavum Orukuṭai niḻaṟkiḻ virasiṁhāsa nattu mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecari paṟmarāna tribhuvanacakrarttikaḷ śrī vikkiramacoḻatevar Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār śrīkoyilil tiyākacamuttiraṉ tiruveṭuttukkaṭṭilil coḻakonil Eḻuntaruḷiyiruntu ceyyat tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār koyilil vikkiramacoḻaṉ tirumāḷikaik kuḷḷuk koyililey Eriyakkaṭavatāka nām vaitta Eṭṭunilaiyaṉ viḷakku Irupatiṉāl viḷakku 1[ 6 10 nū] ṟṟaṟupatum Iraṇṭunilai ṟṟirupatiṉāl viḷakku Iru nūṟṟu nā
kkuḷḷu tiruvaṇukkaṉ tirununtāviḷakkāka Eriyavaitta viḷakkukaḷuk kut tiruviḷakkuppuṟamāka Oṉpatāvatumutal veṟupiṟitta tribhuvana muḻutuṭaiviḷākamum nikki nikkiniṉṟa nilamum Ittevarai muṉpu tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili māṟiṉa kolottuṅkacoḻavaḷanāṭṭut tirunaṟaiyūrnāṭṭu nallāṭiyum yāṇṭu pattāvatumutal tiruviḷak kuppuṟamāka tevatāna Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭu Ivvūrkaḷ pokkaveṇ ṭuvatu Ivvūrkaḷ Antarāyattukku Iṟukkum kācile Iṭa nām coṉṉamaiyil Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭut tiraimūrnāṭṭu nakaram tiruviṭaimarutu muṉpu Ittevarkku Iṟuttuvarum poṉṉāl nilamum nam peṇṭukaḷil tihuvanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷ Ittevar koyilil tiruvuṇṇāḻikaikkuḷḷu tiruvaṇukkaṉ tirununtāviḷakkāka Eriyak kaṭavitāka vaitta viḷakkukkaḷukkut tiruviḷakkuppuṟamāka Oṉpatāvatu mutal veṟupiṟinta tribhuvanamuḻutuṭaiviḷākamum nikki nilam mup pattañcaraiye Iru māvaraik
Digital edition of SII 23.276 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
